D.35.11: Proxy: [Total gross electricity production from fossil] / [Gross electricity production in Gwh] in %.
D.35.3:
Proxy: % production of heating and cooling from fossil sources out of total.
Assumptions: heating is mostly from fossil and cooling from electricity; heating and cooling have equal weight in terms of energy demand. 
Calculation: TEC = 0.5 * 1 + 0.5 TEC(D.35.11).
Exceptions: data is available for Norway (see references in TEC_EU)
